who: freelancers using QuickBooks for payroll processing 5–15 timesheets/month
offer: For freelancers using QuickBooks for payroll processing 5–15 timesheets/month, manual data entry causes late payments. We simplify timesheet conversion instead of manual data entry into QuickBooks.
problem: Difficulty in converting timesheet data into payroll-ready formats
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for QuickBooks freelancers
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll processing
DM outreach to freelancers with demo video
try_it: Let users try manual data entry interface and export to CSV format on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
